---
title: "Team members"
---

## Professionals

- Dra. Anabella Ferral [{{<iconify simple-icons:orcid style="color:#a6ce39;" >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9383-7728)

- Dr. Matías Bonansea [{{<iconify simple-icons:orcid style="color:#a6ce39;">}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1953-2595)

## Interns

- Mgtr. Vítor Gauto [{{<iconify simple-icons:orcid style="color:#a6ce39;">}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9960-8558)
